content.description:
A grid-based page for composing interactive tool UIs from widget items.

Children are items attached to the page, rendered as widgets on a CSS grid. Each attachment's `view` object stores grid position (`col`, `row`, `colSpan`, `rowSpan` - all 1-based, CSS Grid convention).

The page view maintains runtime shared state (`pageContext`) for inter-widget communication.

### Content Fields

- `columns` (number, default 12) - Number of grid columns
- `gap` (number, default 8) - Gap between grid cells in pixels
- `rowHeight` (number, default 40) - Fixed row height in pixels. Each grid row is this tall; widgets span multiple rows via `rowSpan`. Vertical spacing between widgets is achieved via cell padding rather than row-gap.
- `onInit` (string, optional) - JavaScript code executed before widgets render. Receives `api` and `pageContext` as variables. Use to seed `pageContext` state from persisted data so widgets initialize with correct values.

### Attachment View Object

```
{ col: 1, row: 1, colSpan: 12, rowSpan: 1 }
```
